content.json:
# Inter-Region Egress — Cost Estimator
**Theme:** Egress monitoring between Azure regions · **Data source:** `AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL`.

Converts cross-region bytes to GB per region pair and per workload to estimate egress cost drivers.

> This estimates **volume**, not billed price — map GB to your region-pair egress rate card separately.

content.query: AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL | where SubType_s == 'FlowLog' and Src1_Region_s != Dest_Region_s | summarize GB=round(sum(OutboundBytes_d) / 1073741824.0, 2) by Src1_Region_s, Dest_Region_s | sort by GB desc
content.title: GB egressed per cross-region pair

content.query: AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL | where SubType_s == 'FlowLog' and Src1_Region_s != Dest_Region_s | summarize GB=round(sum(OutboundBytes_d) / 1073741824.0, 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d) | render timechart
content.title: Cross-region GB trend (daily)

content.query: AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL | where SubType_s == 'FlowLog' and Src1_Region_s != Dest_Region_s | summarize GB=round(sum(OutboundBytes_d) / 1073741824.0, 2) by Subnet1_s, VM1_s | top 25 by GB desc
content.title: Top egressing workloads (subnet / VM)

content.query: AzureNetworkAnalytics_CL | where SubType_s == 'FlowLog' and Src1_Region_s != Dest_Region_s | summarize TotalGB=round(sum(OutboundBytes_d) / 1073741824.0, 2)
content.title: Total cross-region GB (window)
